posts.author: arulselvan04 (Arul Selvan Bose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I get this error (formula with multiple mirrored values will be available soon) on formula.

ROUNDUP(MULTIPLY(DIVIDE({Expected Monthly Call},30),{Project Duration}),0)

The board has items showing summary of sub item which is linked to summary of sub items from multiple boards.

Is it not possible to use when a value derived from multiple mirror columns.`
